summary: Podcast Player MVP validated end-to-end on mobile viewport (390x844). Backend: 9/9 pytest tests pass (search, top, feed parsing, validation). Frontend: Library empty state + popular grid (12 cards), Search via text and suggestion chips, Podcast detail with artwork/About/60 episodes, Subscribe toggle persists via AsyncStorage, Now Playing modal with play/pause, slider, rate cycling (1x -> 1.25x verified), skip-back 15 and skip-forward 30, close button. MiniPlayer renders on all tab screens and reopens full player on tap. One design/UX gap: MiniPlayer is not rendered on the /podcast/[id] Stack screen (only inside (tabs) layout).

ui_bugs.issue: MiniPlayer is rendered inside app/(tabs)/_layout.tsx only, so it disappears on the /podcast/[id] Stack screen. After a user taps play on an episode, closes the Now Playing modal, they land back on /podcast/[id] with no mini player visible (common UX expectation: persistent mini player across all non-modal screens).

issues: Console: Repeated deprecation warnings - 'shadow*' style props are deprecated (use boxShadow) and 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated (use style.pointerEvents)'. Shows up on every MiniPlayer/Tabs render.

Expo package version mismatches reported by Metro: expo-linear-gradient 55.0.13 (expected ~15.0.8), @react-native-async-storage/async-storage 3.0.2 (expected 2.2.0), @react-native-community/slider 5.2.0 (expected 5.0.1), expo-asset 55.0.16, expo-audio 55.0.14 (expected ~1.1.1), expo-file-system 55.0.17 (expected ~19.0.21). These mismatches can break native builds / Expo Go even though web works.

action_items: Move MiniPlayer mount point to the root Stack layout (app/_layout.tsx) so it also appears on /podcast/[id] (keep it hidden only on /player modal). E.g., render <MiniPlayer /> as a sibling of <Stack/> inside PlayerProvider, conditionally hide when route is /player.
Replace deprecated 'shadow*' style props with boxShadow and move pointerEvents from prop to style across MiniPlayer/Tabs/screens to silence the warning spam.

Reconcile Expo SDK package versions (run `npx expo install --check` and apply suggested fixes) so Expo Go / native builds match web. At minimum align expo-audio, expo-file-system, async-storage, slider, linear-gradient.
Consider persisting 'last played' across refresh by restoring PROGRESS_KEY into PlayerContext on mount (currently saved but never loaded).
critical_code_review_comments: PlayerContext: PROGRESS_KEY is written via saveProgress but never read back on mount, so resume-from-last-position isn't functional.

PlayerContext polling uses the AudioPlayer object directly as 'status' (status.currentTime / status.playing) instead of a proper status event. Works with expo-audio createAudioPlayer but is brittle; prefer addPlaybackStatusListener when available.

backend/server.py _parse_feed_sync image-resolution has a convoluted ternary for image.href that can return an empty string silently; consider simplifying and fall back to itunes_image/itunes:image at feed level more robustly.
API client (src/api.ts) has no timeout/error-retry and loses the response body on non-2xx. Surfacing iTunes 502 messages to UI would help debug.
seed_data_creation: None. All data is fetched live from iTunes Search API and real RSS feeds (Radiolab used as canonical test podcast).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Use mobile viewport 390x844. EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL in frontend/.env is https://pod-stream-2.preview.emergentagent.com (request header mentioned a different host id, but .env is the source of truth). Canonical test flow: Search -> 'radiolab' -> first result -> Subscribe -> play-episode-0 -> player modal (player-play-pause, player-slider, player-rate, player-skip-back, player-skip-forward, player-close). MiniPlayer has testIDs mini-player / mini-player-open / mini-player-play-pause. Backend tests live at /app/backend/tests/test_podcast_api.py and can be rerun with: EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL=<url> pytest /app/backend/tests -v.
rca_of_issue: MiniPlayer visibility gap: It is rendered as a child of <Tabs/> in app/(tabs)/_layout.tsx, so when the router is on /podcast/[id] (a sibling Stack route) the tabs layout is unmounted from view and MiniPlayer disappears. Fix is to hoist <MiniPlayer/> into app/_layout.tsx inside PlayerProvider, hidden when pathname === '/player' (modal). This preserves the mini player across Library/Search/Downloads/podcast-detail and only hides under the full-screen player.
